name: ExtensionSubstanceDefinition_SourceMaterial_Genus
title: R5: The genus of an organism e.g. the Latin epithet of the plant/animal scientific name (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `SubstanceDefinition.sourceMaterial.genus` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`SubstanceDefinition.sourceMaterial.genus` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `SubstanceDefinition.sourceMaterial.genus` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`
*  R4B: `SubstanceDefinition.sourceMaterial.genus` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `SubstanceDefinition.sourceMaterial.genus` has a context of SubstanceSpecification.sourceMaterial based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `SubstanceSpecification`.
Element `SubstanceDefinition.sourceMaterial.genus` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
